items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for an IT Systems Administrator to manage and secure our corporate technology infrastructure. You will be responsible for endpoint management, identity and access management, SaaS application administration, and IT support for a distributed workforce of 200+ employees.

This is a hands-on role where you will solve problems daily, implement security controls, and ensure that everyone in the company has the tools they need to do their best work.

Responsibilities

  • Manage endpoint deployment, configuration, and security using MDM solutions (Jamf, Intune)
  • Administer identity and access management via Okta, including SSO and SCIM provisioning
  • Manage corporate SaaS applications (Google Workspace, Slack, Zoom, Jira, Confluence)
  • Provide Tier 2/3 IT support for hardware and software issues
  • Implement and enforce IT security policies, including device encryption and zero-trust networking
  • Manage IT asset inventory, procurement, and lifecycle

Requirements

  • 3+ years of IT systems administration experience
  • Experience managing macOS and Windows endpoints in an enterprise environment
  • Proficiency with identity management platforms (Okta, Azure AD)
  • Knowledge of networking fundamentals (DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewall rules)
  • Strong troubleshooting skills and customer service orientation

Nice to Have

  • Experience with zero-trust network access tools (Cloudflare Access, Zscaler)
  • Scripting abilities (Bash, PowerShell, Python)
  • CompTIA, ITIL, or similar certifications
